pipeline.title: 我认为... · 中译英

items.zh: 我认为每个人都需要意识到这个问题。
items.answer: I think everyone needs to be aware of this problem.

items.zh: 我认为文化交流非常重要。
items.answer: I think cultural exchange is very important.

items.zh: 我认为这次旅行很愉快。
items.answer: I think the trip was very pleasant.

pipeline.title: 我认为... · 英译中

items.en: I think the exhibition was fascinating.
items.answer: 我认为这个展览很吸引人。

items.en: I think we need a global solution.
items.answer: 我认为我们需要一个全球性的解决方案。

items.en: I think education is a powerful tool.
items.answer: 我认为教育是一个强大的工具。

pipeline.title: 我认为... · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I think (that) ___. / I don't think (that) ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我认为... / 我认为...不...

items.zh: 我认为你是对的。
items.answer: I think that you are right.

items.zh: 我不认为他会来。
items.answer: I don't think that he will come.

items.zh: 我认为这是个好主意。
items.answer: I think that it's a good idea.

pipeline.title: 我认为... · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: I think / I believe / I feel

patterns.chunk: I think (that) ___. / I believe (that) ___.

items.zh: 我认为你做得对。
items.answer: I think that you did the right thing.

items.zh: 我相信他会成功的。
items.answer: I believe that he will succeed.

patterns.chunk: I feel (that) ___. / I don't think (that) ___.

items.zh: 我觉得我们应该等等。
items.answer: I feel that we should wait.

items.zh: 我不认为这是个好主意。
items.answer: I don't think that it's a good idea.

pipeline.title: 我知道/听说 · 中译英

items.zh: 我知道这需要很大的改进。
items.answer: I know that this needs a lot of improvement.

items.zh: 我听说生产已经开始了。
items.answer: I heard that production has already started.

items.zh: 我知道这涵盖了一个很大的范围。
items.answer: I know that this covers a wide range.

pipeline.title: 我知道/听说 · 英译中

items.en: I know that environmental issues are serious.
items.answer: 我知道环境问题很严重。

items.en: I heard that the exhibition was a success.
items.answer: 我听说那个展览很成功。

items.en: I know that these two topics are related.
items.answer: 我知道这两个话题是相关的。

pipeline.title: 我知道/听说 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I know (that) ___. / I heard (that) ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我知道... / 我听说...

items.zh: 我知道你很忙。
items.answer: I know that you are busy.

items.zh: 我听说那家店要关了。
items.answer: I heard that the store is closing.

items.zh: 我听说她搬去伦敦了。
items.answer: I heard that she moved to London.

pipeline.title: 我知道/听说 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: I know / I heard / I'm sure

patterns.chunk: I know (that) ___. / I'm sure (that) ___.

items.zh: 我知道他会来的。
items.answer: I know that he will come.

items.zh: 我确定一切都会好的。
items.answer: I'm sure that everything will be fine.

patterns.chunk: I heard (that) ___. / I'm sorry (that) ___.

items.zh: 我听说他们结婚了。
items.answer: I heard that they got married.

items.zh: 抱歉我迟到了。
items.answer: I'm sorry that I'm late.

pipeline.title: 不确定 · 中译英

items.zh: 我不确定他是否感到焦虑。
items.answer: I'm not sure whether he feels anxious.

items.zh: 我不确定她是否会否认这件事。
items.answer: I'm not sure if she will deny it.

items.zh: 我不确定在这种情况下该怎么办。
items.answer: I'm not sure what to do in this circumstance.

pipeline.title: 不确定 · 英译中

items.en: I'm not sure how to translate this word.
items.answer: 我不确定这个词怎么翻译。

items.en: I'm not sure if the story is imaginary.
items.answer: 我不确定这个故事是不是虚构的。

items.en: I'm not sure why it seems unfair.
items.answer: 我不确定为什么它看起来不公平。

pipeline.title: 不确定 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I'm not sure (that) ___. / I don't know what ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我不确定... / 我不知道...

items.zh: 我不确定我能去。
items.answer: I'm not sure that I can go.

items.zh: 我不知道他想要什么。
items.answer: I don't know what he wants.

items.zh: 我不知道她说了什么。
items.answer: I don't know what she said.

pipeline.title: 不确定 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 加内容
levels.en: I'm not sure that I can go.

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: I'm not sure that I can go because I have a meeting.
levels.zh: 我不确定我能去，因为我有个会。

pipeline.title: 转述他人 · 中译英

items.zh: 他跟我说了这个情况的来龙去脉。
items.answer: He gave an account of the situation.

items.zh: 她说团队由五个人组成。
items.answer: She said the team consists of five people.

items.zh: 他告诉我他打算参加活动。
items.answer: He told me that he plans to participate.

pipeline.title: 转述他人 · 英译中

items.en: He said that this element is important.
items.answer: 他说这个元素很重要。

items.en: She told me that the nation is celebrating.
items.answer: 她告诉我全国都在庆祝。

items.en: He mentioned that the event will occur next week.
items.answer: 他提到这个活动将在下周举行。

pipeline.title: 转述他人 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: He said (that) ___. / She told me (that) ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 他说... / 她告诉我...

items.zh: 他说他会来。
items.answer: He said that he would come.

items.zh: 她告诉我她喜欢这个。
items.answer: She told me that she liked it.

items.zh: 他说他们准备离开了。
items.answer: He said that they were leaving.

pipeline.title: 转述他人 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: He said / She told me / I heard / They explained
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 他说/她告诉我/我听说/他们解释

patterns.chunk: He said (that) ___. / She told me (that) ___.

items.zh: 他说他忙完了。
items.answer: He said that he was done.

items.zh: 她告诉我她已经准备好了。
items.answer: She told me that she was ready.

patterns.chunk: I heard (that) ___. / They explained (that) ___.

items.zh: 我听说价格涨了。
items.answer: I heard that the price went up.

items.zh: 他们解释了为什么会出问题。
items.answer: They explained that something went wrong.

pipeline.title: 疑问词从句 · 中译英

items.zh: 我不知道是什么挡住了路。
items.answer: I don't know what is blocking the road.

items.zh: 我想知道他们为什么把东西埋了。
items.answer: I wonder why they buried it.

items.zh: 你能告诉我船在哪里沉没的吗？
items.answer: Can you tell me where the ship sank?

pipeline.title: 疑问词从句 · 英译中

items.en: I don't know where the tape is.
items.answer: 我不知道磁带在哪里。

items.en: Can you tell me what the total sum is?
items.answer: 你能告诉我总额是多少吗？

items.en: I wonder why he is so spiritual.
items.answer: 我想知道他为什么那么有灵性。

pipeline.title: 疑问词从句 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I don't know what ___. / Can you tell me where ___? / I wonder why ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我不知道... / 你能告诉我...吗？ / 我想知道为什么...

items.zh: 我不知道该做什么。
items.answer: I don't know what to do.

items.zh: 你能告诉我车站在哪吗？
items.answer: Can you tell me where the station is?

items.zh: 我想知道他为什么走了。
items.answer: I wonder why he left.

pipeline.title: 疑问词从句 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: I don't know / Can you tell me / I wonder
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 我不知道/你能告诉我吗/我想知道

patterns.chunk: I don't know what ___. / I don't know where ___.

items.zh: 我不知道她想要什么。
items.answer: I don't know what she wants.

items.zh: 我不知道他去哪了。
items.answer: I don't know where he went.

patterns.chunk: Can you tell me when ___? / I wonder why ___.

items.zh: 你能告诉我什么时候开始吗？
items.answer: Can you tell me when it starts?

items.zh: 我想知道她为什么不在。
items.answer: I wonder why she isn't here.

pipeline.title: 描述物品 · 中译英

items.zh: 这本书属于一个有趣的类别。
items.answer: This book belongs to an interesting category.

items.zh: 我读的那个条款很清楚。
items.answer: The clause that I read is very clear.

items.zh: 我测量的那个深度令人惊讶。
items.answer: The depth that I measured was surprising.

pipeline.title: 描述物品 · 英译中

items.en: The curtain that she bought is beautiful.
items.answer: 她买的那块窗帘很漂亮。

items.en: The expense that we budgeted was not enough.
items.answer: 我们预算的那笔费用不够。

items.en: The shift that I worked was very long.
items.answer: 我上的那个班次很长。

pipeline.title: 描述物品 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: The ___ that I ___ is ___.

items.zh: 我读的那本书很有趣。
items.answer: The book that I read is interesting.

items.zh: 我看的那部电影很好。
items.answer: The movie that I watched is good.

items.zh: 我喜欢的那个食物是辣的。
items.answer: The food that I like is spicy.

pipeline.title: 描述物品 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: that / which

patterns.chunk: The ___ that I ___ is ___. / The ___ which I ___ is ___.

items.zh: 我买的那只猫很可爱。
items.answer: The cat that I bought is very cute.

items.zh: 我选的那条裙子太贵了。
items.answer: The dress which I chose is too expensive.

patterns.chunk: Is this the ___ that you ___?

items.zh: 这是你喜欢的那个颜色吗？
items.answer: Is this the color that you like?

items.zh: 这是你推荐的那家餐厅吗？
items.answer: Is this the restaurant that you recommended?

pipeline.title: 描述人 · 中译英

items.zh: 懂得控制情绪的人更成熟。
items.answer: A person who controls emotions is more mature.

items.zh: 有丰富想象力的人很有创造力。
items.answer: A person who has rich imagination is creative.

items.zh: 你能帮我找到那个人的位置吗？
items.answer: Can you locate the person who called?

pipeline.title: 描述人 · 英译中

items.en: The person who gave the proper advice helped me a lot.
items.answer: 那个给出恰当建议的人帮了我很多。

items.en: A colleague who works with rapid speed is very efficient.
items.answer: 做事迅速的同事实在很高效。

items.en: The manager who summarized the report did a great job.
items.answer: 总结报告的那个经理做得很好。

pipeline.title: 描述人 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: The person who ___ is ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 那个...的人是...。

items.zh: 打电话的那个人是我老板。
items.answer: The person who called is my boss.

items.zh: 帮我那个人是我朋友。
items.answer: The person who helped me is my friend.

items.zh: 在等的那个人是我老师。
items.answer: The person who is waiting is my teacher.

pipeline.title: 描述人 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: who / that

patterns.chunk: The person who ___ is ___. / The man who ___ is ___.

items.zh: 帮我那个人很善良。
items.answer: The person who helped me is very kind.

items.zh: 在门口等的那个人是我哥哥。
items.answer: The man who is waiting at the door is my brother.

patterns.chunk: Do you know the ___ who ___?

items.zh: 你认识坐在那边的那个女孩吗？
items.answer: Do you know the girl who is sitting over there?

items.zh: 你认识在这里工作的那个人吗？
items.answer: Do you know the person who works here?

pipeline.title: 地点与原因 · 中译英

items.zh: 我们见面的那个体育场很大。
items.answer: The stadium where we met is very big.

items.zh: 这就是我感受到压力的原因。
items.answer: This is the reason why I felt pressure.

items.zh: 这就是为什么截止日期到了。
items.answer: This is the reason why it's due.

pipeline.title: 地点与原因 · 英译中

items.en: The place where people tend to gather is the park.
items.answer: 人们倾向于聚集的地方是公园。

items.en: This is the reason why the trend changed.
items.answer: 这就是为什么趋势改变了。

items.en: The office where we resolve issues is on the second floor.
items.answer: 我们解决问题的办公室在二楼。

pipeline.title: 地点与原因 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: The ___ where ___ is ___. / This is the reason why ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: ...的地方是... / 这就是为什么...。

items.zh: 我们见面的那家餐厅还在那里。
items.answer: The restaurant where we met is still there.

items.zh: 这就是我打电话的原因。
items.answer: This is the reason why I called.

items.zh: 我们散步的那个公园很漂亮。
items.answer: The park where we walked is beautiful.

pipeline.title: 地点与原因 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 基本陈述
levels.en: The restaurant where we met is still there.
levels.zh: 我们见面的那家餐厅还在那里。

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: The restaurant where we met is still there and that's the reason why I go back.
levels.zh: 我们见面的那家餐厅还在那里，这就是为什么我回去的原因。

levels.label: 加感受
levels.en: The restaurant where we met is still there and that's the reason why I go back because it brings back good memories.
levels.zh: 我们见面的餐厅还在那里，这就是为什么我回去，因为它带来美好回忆。

pipeline.title: 偏好描述 · 中译英

items.zh: 我最喜欢的电影是那种让人放松的。
items.answer: The movie that I like most is the relaxing kind.

items.zh: 我最关心的是安全问题。
items.answer: The thing that I care about most is safety.

items.zh: 我不喜欢那种暴力的电影。
items.answer: I don't like movies that are violent.

pipeline.title: 偏好描述 · 英译中

items.en: The book that I think is worth reading is this one.
items.answer: 我觉得值得读的那本书是这本。

items.en: The conclusion that I drew is different from yours.
items.answer: 我得出的那个结论和你的不同。

items.en: I like people who are consistent.
items.answer: 我喜欢言行一致的人。

pipeline.title: 偏好描述 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: The ___ that I like most is ___. / I like ___ that ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我最喜欢的...是... / 我喜欢...的...。

items.zh: 我最喜欢的书是《杀死一只知更鸟》。
items.answer: The book that I like most is To Kill a Mockingbird.
items.pattern: The ___ that I like most is ___.

items.zh: 我喜欢能让我笑的电影。
items.answer: I like movies that make me laugh.

items.zh: 我最喜欢的颜色是蓝色。
items.answer: The color that I like most is blue.
items.pattern: The ___ that I like most is ___.

pipeline.title: 偏好描述 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: like most / prefer / favorite

patterns.chunk: The ___ that I like most is ___. / I prefer ___ that ___.

items.zh: 我最喜欢的音乐是爵士乐。
items.answer: The music that I like most is jazz.

items.zh: 我偏爱那些温暖的颜色。
items.answer: I prefer colors that are warm.

patterns.chunk: My favorite ___ is ___. / The ___ that I enjoy most is ___.

items.zh: 我最喜欢的季节是秋天。
items.answer: My favorite season is autumn.

items.zh: 我最享受的活动是旅行。
items.answer: The activity that I enjoy most is traveling.

pipeline.title: 综合描述 · 中译英

items.zh: 我们相隔很远，但友谊不变。
items.answer: We live apart from each other but the friendship that we have remains.

items.zh: 我家的篱笆是白色的。
items.answer: The fence that surrounds my house is white.

items.zh: 他忘了他借我的那只手套了。
items.answer: He forgot the glove that I lent him.

pipeline.title: 综合描述 · 英译中

items.en: The change that is rapid is sometimes hard to follow.
items.answer: 那种快速的变化有时候难以跟上。

items.en: The details that are unnecessary should be removed.
items.answer: 那些不必要的细节应该去掉。

items.en: The building that is historic is worth preserving.
items.answer: 那个有历史意义的建筑值得保护。

pipeline.title: 综合描述 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: The ___ that ___ is someone / something that ___.
slots: friend helped me I can always trust

items.zh: 帮我的那个朋友是我永远可以信任的人。
items.answer: The friend who helped me is someone that I can always trust.

slotValues.slot1: friend helped me I can always trust

items.zh: 我读的那本书是值得读的。
items.answer: The book that I read is something that is worth reading.

items.zh: 我们去的那个地方真的很美。
items.answer: The place that we visited is truly beautiful.

pipeline.title: 综合描述 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: that / who / where

patterns.chunk: There are many ___ that I want to ___. / The ___ who ___ is someone that ___.

items.zh: 有很多我想读的书。
items.answer: There are many books that I want to read.

items.zh: 帮助我的朋友是我最信任的人。
items.answer: The friend who helped me is someone that I trust most.

patterns.chunk: The ___ where ___ is ___. / I like the ___ that ___.

items.zh: 我们学习的地方是图书馆。
items.answer: The place where we study is the library.

items.zh: 我喜欢你选的那一个。
items.answer: I like the one that you chose.

pipeline.title: 想要/希望 · 中译英

items.zh: 我想要学习更多以提升自己。
items.answer: I desire to learn more to improve myself.

items.zh: 我钦佩那些坚持不懈的人。
items.answer: I admire people who never give up.

items.zh: 我希望为团队带来荣誉。
items.answer: I hope to bring honour to the team.

pipeline.title: 想要/希望 · 英译中

items.en: I want to work with experienced people.
items.answer: 我想和有经验的人一起工作。

items.en: I hope to graduate next year.
items.answer: 我希望明年毕业。

items.en: I want to make my family proud.
items.answer: 我想让家人为我骄傲。

pipeline.title: 想要/希望 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I want to ___. / I hope to ___. / I would like to ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我想... / 我希望... / 我想要...。

items.zh: 我想学西班牙语。
items.answer: I want to learn Spanish.

items.zh: 我希望很快再见到你。
items.answer: I hope to see you again soon.

items.zh: 我想申请这份工作。
items.answer: I would like to apply for this job.

pipeline.title: 想要/希望 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: want to / hope to / would like to

patterns.chunk: I want to ___. / I hope to ___.

items.zh: 我想环游世界。
items.answer: I want to travel around the world.

items.zh: 我希望有一天能再去。
items.answer: I hope to go again someday.

patterns.chunk: I would like to ___. / I plan to ___.

items.zh: 我想订一张桌子。
items.answer: I would like to book a table.

items.zh: 我计划明年去留学。
items.answer: I plan to study abroad next year.

pipeline.title: 决定/承诺 · 中译英

items.zh: 我决定先分析数据再做决定。
items.answer: I decided to analyse the data before making a decision.

items.zh: 我承诺会深入调查此事。
items.answer: I promised to investigate the matter thoroughly.

items.zh: 我决定得出结论之前再考虑一下。
items.answer: I decided to conclude after more consideration.

pipeline.title: 决定/承诺 · 英译中

items.en: I decided to get engaged last month.
items.answer: 我上个月决定订婚了。

items.en: I promised to retain the original design.
items.answer: 我承诺保留原来的设计。

items.en: I decided to oppose the new plan.
items.answer: 我决定反对这个新计划。

pipeline.title: 决定/承诺 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I decided to ___. / I promised to ___. / I chose to ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我决定... / 我承诺... / 我选择...。

items.zh: 我决定出国留学。
items.answer: I decided to study abroad.

items.zh: 我承诺帮助他。
items.answer: I promised to help him.

items.zh: 她选择待在家里。
items.answer: She chose to stay at home.

pipeline.title: 决定/承诺 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: I decided to study abroad because I want to learn more.
levels.zh: 我决定出国留学，因为我想学更多。

levels.label: 加承诺
levels.en: I decided to study abroad because I want to learn more and I promised myself I would do it.
levels.zh: 我决定出国留学，因为我想学更多，而且我对自己承诺过我会做到的。
levels.hint: 加上 promised 加强语气

pipeline.title: 为了...目的 · 中译英

items.zh: 我来这里是为了学习必要的技能。
items.answer: I came here to learn essential skills.

items.zh: 我锻炼是为了保持健康。
items.answer: I exercise to maintain my fitness.

items.zh: 我早起是为了做最重要的事。
items.answer: I wake up early to do something vital.

pipeline.title: 为了...目的 · 英译中

items.en: I went to the finance sector to find a job.
items.answer: 我去金融行业找工作。

items.en: I practice every day to improve my performance.
items.answer: 我每天练习来提高我的表现。

items.en: I study hard to understand the theory.
items.answer: 我努力学习以理解这个理论。

pipeline.title: 为了...目的 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I ___ to ___. / I went to ___ to ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我做...是为了... / 我去...是为了...。

items.zh: 我来这里学英语。
items.answer: I came here to study English.

items.zh: 我去商店买食物。
items.answer: I went to the store to buy some food.

items.zh: 我存钱买车。
items.answer: I saved money to buy a car.

pipeline.title: 为了...目的 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: to / in order to / so as to

patterns.chunk: I ___ to ___. / I ___ in order to ___.

items.zh: 我打电话确认时间。
items.answer: I called to confirm the time.

items.zh: 我早起为了赶上第一班车。
items.answer: I got up early in order to catch the first bus.

patterns.chunk: I ___ so as to ___.

items.zh: 我轻声说话以免吵醒她。
items.answer: I spoke softly so as not to wake her up.

items.zh: 他提前到达以免迟到。
items.answer: He arrived early so as not to be late.

pipeline.title: 评价：做...是...的 · 中译英

items.zh: 面对现实是很重要的。
items.answer: It's important to face reality.

items.zh: 做这种需要勇气的事情很难。
items.answer: It's hard to do something that takes nerve.

items.zh: 在结束之前把工作做完很重要。
items.answer: It's important to wrap up the work before leaving.

pipeline.title: 评价：做...是...的 · 英译中

items.en: It's shocking to hear the news.
items.answer: 听到这个消息很震惊。

items.en: It's nice to have a smooth journey.
items.answer: 旅途顺利是很令人愉快的。

items.en: It's sad to see the business decline.
items.answer: 看到生意下滑很难过。

pipeline.title: 评价：做...是...的 · 句型

items.zh: 每天练习很重要。
items.answer: It's important to practice every day.

items.zh: 和朋友一起旅行很有趣。
items.answer: It's fun to travel with friends.

items.zh: 说再见很难。
items.answer: It's hard to say goodbye.

pipeline.title: 评价：做...是...的 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: It's ___ to / It's important to / It's fun to

patterns.chunk: It's ___ to ___. / It's important to ___.

items.zh: 保持健康很重要。
items.answer: It's important to stay healthy.

items.zh: 尝试新事物很有趣。
items.answer: It's fun to try new things.

patterns.chunk: It's hard to ___. / It's nice to ___.

items.zh: 学好一门语言很难。
items.answer: It's hard to learn a language well.

items.zh: 能再见到你真好。
items.answer: It's nice to see you again.

pipeline.title: 有事要做 · 中译英

items.zh: 我有些工作要在结束前完成。
items.answer: I have some work to wrap up.

items.zh: 我有一些信息要保留。
items.answer: I have some information to retain.

items.zh: 我有几个行业要研究。
items.answer: I have several sectors to research.

pipeline.title: 有事要做 · 英译中

items.en: I have some theories to test.
items.answer: 我有一些理论要测试。

items.en: I have some ideas to oppose.
items.answer: 我有一些想法要反对。

items.en: I have some shocking news to share.
items.answer: 我有一些令人震惊的消息要分享。

pipeline.title: 有事要做 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I have ___ to ___.

items.zh: 我有事要告诉你。
items.answer: I have something to tell you.

items.zh: 我有很多要学。
items.answer: I have a lot to learn.

items.zh: 我无话可说。
items.answer: I have nothing to say.

pipeline.title: 有事要做 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: have something / have a lot / have nothing

patterns.chunk: I have ___ to ___. / Do you have ___ to ___?

items.zh: 我有事要问。
items.answer: I have something to ask.

items.zh: 你有什么要说的吗？
items.answer: Do you have anything to say?

patterns.chunk: I have ___ to ___. / Give me ___ to ___.

items.zh: 我有很多工作要做。
items.answer: I have a lot of work to do.

items.zh: 给我点吃的。
items.answer: Give me something to eat.

pipeline.title: 我喜欢做... · 中译英

items.zh: 我喜欢承认错误并从中学习。
items.answer: I enjoy admitting mistakes and learning from them.

items.zh: 我相信保持积极信念很重要。
items.answer: I believe in maintaining positive beliefs.

items.zh: 我喜欢收集邮票。
items.answer: I enjoy collecting stamps.

pipeline.title: 我喜欢做... · 英译中

items.en: I enjoy decorating my room.
items.answer: 我喜欢装饰我的房间。

items.en: I like cooking with fresh ingredients.
items.answer: 我喜欢用新鲜食材做饭。

items.en: I enjoy keeping a journal.
items.answer: 我喜欢写日记。

pipeline.title: 我喜欢做... · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I enjoy ___. / I like ___. / I love ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我喜欢...。

items.zh: 我喜欢读书。
items.answer: I enjoy reading books.

items.zh: 我喜欢游泳。
items.answer: I like swimming.

items.zh: 我热爱看电影。
items.answer: I love watching movies.

pipeline.title: 我喜欢做... · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: enjoy / like / love / hate

patterns.chunk: I enjoy ___. / I like ___, but I don't like ___.

items.zh: 我喜欢听音乐。
items.answer: I enjoy listening to music.

items.zh: 我喜欢游泳，但不喜欢跑步。
items.answer: I like swimming but I don't like running.

patterns.chunk: I love ___. / I hate ___.

items.zh: 我周末喜欢看电影。
items.answer: I love watching movies on weekends.

items.zh: 我讨厌排长队。
items.answer: I hate waiting in long lines.

pipeline.title: 开始/结束/继续 · 中译英

items.zh: 我决定开始提高我的技能。
items.answer: I determined to start enhancing my skills.

items.zh: 我开始维护这个系统。
items.answer: I started maintaining the system.

items.zh: 我继续努力提升自己。
items.answer: I keep enhancing myself.

pipeline.title: 开始/结束/继续 · 英译中

items.en: The company started exporting last year.
items.answer: 这家公司去年开始出口。

items.en: They finished importing the goods.
items.answer: 他们完成了商品进口。

items.en: We keep modifying the design.
items.answer: 我们继续修改设计。

pipeline.title: 开始/结束/继续 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I started ___. / I finished ___. / I keep ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我开始... / 我完成... / 我继续...。

items.zh: 我开始学英语。
items.answer: I started learning English.

items.zh: 我写完了报告。
items.answer: I finished writing the report.

items.zh: 我不断尽力而为。
items.answer: I keep trying my best.

pipeline.title: 开始/结束/继续 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 加时间
levels.en: I started learning English two years ago.

levels.label: 加持续
levels.en: I started learning English two years ago and I keep practicing every day.
levels.zh: 我两年前开始学英语，并且坚持每天练习。

pipeline.title: 擅长/对...感兴趣 · 中译英

items.zh: 我擅长说服别人。
items.answer: I am good at convincing people.

items.zh: 我对反思过去的经历很感兴趣。
items.answer: I am interested in reflecting on past experiences.

items.zh: 我擅长获取相关资格。
items.answer: I am good at getting qualifications.

pipeline.title: 擅长/对...感兴趣 · 英译中

items.en: I am good at reminding people of their schedules.
items.answer: 我擅长提醒人们他们的日程。

items.en: I am interested in taking risks sometimes.
items.answer: 我有时对冒险感兴趣。

items.en: I am good at taking things seriously.
items.answer: 我擅长认真对待事情。

pipeline.title: 擅长/对...感兴趣 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I am good at ___. / I am interested in ___. / I am tired of ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我擅长... / 我对...感兴趣 / 我厌倦了...。

items.zh: 我擅长记名字。
items.answer: I am good at remembering names.

items.zh: 我对学新东西感兴趣。
items.answer: I am interested in learning new things.

items.zh: 我厌倦了等待。
items.answer: I am tired of waiting.

pipeline.title: 擅长/对...感兴趣 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: good at / interested in / tired of

patterns.chunk: I am good at ___. / I am interested in ___.

items.zh: 我擅长解决问题。
items.answer: I am good at solving problems.

items.zh: 她对摄影感兴趣。
items.answer: She is interested in photography.

patterns.chunk: I am tired of ___. / I am excited about ___.

items.zh: 我厌倦了无休止的等待。
items.answer: I am tired of endless waiting.

items.zh: 我对即将到来的旅行感到兴奋。
items.answer: I am excited about the upcoming trip.

pipeline.title: 做...很有趣 · 中译英

items.zh: 解决令人困惑的问题很有趣。
items.answer: Solving confusing problems is a lot of fun.

items.zh: 尝试各种不同的活动很有趣。
items.answer: Trying various activities is a lot of fun.

items.zh: 在黄金时段锻炼很有趣。
items.answer: Exercising at prime time is a lot of fun.

pipeline.title: 做...很有趣 · 英译中

items.en: Discussing politics is interesting.
items.answer: 讨论政治很有趣。

items.en: Traveling to southern cities is enjoyable.
items.answer: 去南方城市旅行很令人愉快。

items.en: Keeping a tight schedule is challenging but fun.
items.answer: 保持紧凑的日程有挑战性但也很有趣。

pipeline.title: 做...很有趣 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: ___ is a lot of fun. / ___ is good for ___.

items.zh: 游泳很有趣。
items.answer: Swimming is a lot of fun.

items.zh: 游泳对你的健康有好处。
items.answer: Swimming is good for your health.

items.zh: 阅读对你大脑有好处。
items.answer: Reading is good for your brain.

pipeline.title: 做...很有趣 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: Swimming / Traveling / Reading

patterns.chunk: ___ is a lot of fun. / ___ is good for ___.

items.zh: 跳舞很有趣。
items.answer: Dancing is a lot of fun.

items.zh: 学习新语言对大脑有好处。
items.answer: Learning a new language is good for your brain.

patterns.chunk: ___ is good for ___. / I think ___ is ___.

items.zh: 锻炼对身体好。
items.answer: Exercise is good for your body.

items.zh: 我觉得做饭很放松。
items.answer: I think cooking is relaxing.

pipeline.title: 感谢/道歉 · 中译英

items.zh: 感谢你为我守护。
items.answer: Thank you for guarding me.

items.zh: 谢谢你的警告。
items.answer: Thank you for the warning.

items.zh: 抱歉让你察觉到了症状。
items.answer: I'm sorry for noticing the symptom.

pipeline.title: 感谢/道歉 · 英译中

items.en: Thank you for making me feel comfortable when I felt uncomfortable.
items.answer: 谢谢你在我不舒服的时候让我感到自在。

items.en: I'm sorry for the sticky situation.
items.answer: 抱歉造成了这个棘手的局面。

items.en: Thank you for understanding that I am shy.
items.answer: 谢谢你理解我害羞。

pipeline.title: 感谢/道歉 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: Thank you for ___. / I'm sorry for ___.

items.zh: 谢谢你帮我。
items.answer: Thank you for helping me.

items.zh: 抱歉我迟到了。
items.answer: I'm sorry for being late.

items.zh: 谢谢你打电话来。
items.answer: Thank you for calling.

pipeline.title: 感谢/道歉 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: Thank you for / I'm sorry for

patterns.chunk: Thank you for ___. / Thanks for ___.

items.zh: 谢谢你的时间。
items.answer: Thank you for your time.

items.zh: 谢谢你等我。
items.answer: Thanks for waiting for me.

patterns.chunk: I'm sorry for ___. / I apologize for ___.

items.zh: 抱歉打扰你了。
items.answer: I'm sorry for disturbing you.

items.zh: 我为我的错误道歉。
items.answer: I apologize for my mistake.

pipeline.title: 混合从句与不定式 · 中译英

items.zh: 我认为认识到学习的重要性很重要。
items.answer: I think it's important to recognize the importance of learning.

items.zh: 我知道设定目标是必要的。
items.answer: I know that it's necessary to set objectives.

items.zh: 我认为负担旅行费用很重要。
items.answer: I think it's important to afford the travel costs.

pipeline.title: 混合从句与不定式 · 英译中

items.en: I think it's important to stay determined.
items.answer: 我认为保持决心很重要。

items.en: I know that we need to examine the evidence.
items.answer: 我知道我们需要检查证据。

items.en: I believe it's important to have faith.
items.answer: 我相信有信念很重要。

pipeline.title: 混合从句与不定式 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I think it's ___ to ___. / I know that ___ needs to ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我认为做...是很...的。/ 我知道...需要...。

items.zh: 我认为每天练习很重要。
items.answer: I think it's important to practice every day.

items.zh: 我知道他需要更努力学习。
items.answer: I know that he needs to study harder.

items.zh: 我认为尝试新事物很有趣。
items.answer: I think it's fun to try new things.

pipeline.title: 混合从句与不定式 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: I think it's / I know that / I believe

patterns.chunk: I think it's ___ to ___. / I know that ___ wants to ___.

items.zh: 我认为保持健康很重要。
items.answer: I think it's important to stay healthy.

items.zh: 我知道他想当医生。
items.answer: I know that he wants to be a doctor.

patterns.chunk: I believe that ___ is ___. / The best thing that you can do is to ___.

items.zh: 我相信学英语很有趣。
items.answer: I believe that learning English is fun.

items.zh: 你能做的最好的事就是继续尝试。
items.answer: The best thing that you can do is to keep trying.

pipeline.title: 混合不定式与动名词 · 中译英

items.zh: 我决定戒烟，转而开始跑步。
items.answer: I decided to quit smoking and started running instead.

items.zh: 我承诺投入这个项目并坚持下去。
items.answer: I committed to the project and keep working on it.

items.zh: 我打算租房子，不想继续付房租了。
items.answer: I plan to rent a house instead of paying rent forever.

pipeline.title: 混合不定式与动名词 · 英译中

items.en: I like growing crops but I hate waiting for harvest.
items.answer: 我喜欢种庄稼但讨厌等待收获。

items.en: I started printing my own designs and hope to sell them.
items.answer: 我开始打印自己的设计并希望卖掉它们。

items.en: I enjoy cooking with a pot but I need to learn more recipes.
items.answer: 我喜欢用锅做饭但我需要学更多食谱。

pipeline.title: 混合不定式与动名词 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I like ___. / I decided to ___. / I keep ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我喜欢... / 我决定... / 我坚持...。

items.zh: 我喜欢做饭，决定学新菜谱。
items.answer: I like cooking and decided to learn new recipes.

items.zh: 我喜欢旅行，决定为旅行存钱。
items.answer: I enjoy traveling and decided to save money for trips.

items.zh: 我喜欢阅读，坚持买更多书。
items.answer: I love reading and keep buying more books.

pipeline.title: 混合不定式与动名词 · 逐步构建

levels.label: 加决定
levels.en: I enjoy cooking and decided to learn new recipes.
levels.zh: 我喜欢做饭并决定学新菜谱。

levels.label: 加目的
levels.en: I enjoy cooking and decided to learn new recipes to surprise my family.
levels.zh: 我喜欢做饭并决定学新菜谱，为了给我的家人惊喜。

pipeline.title: 叙事：我的一段经历 · 中译英

items.zh: 我经历了一段激励人心的旅程。
items.answer: I had an experience that inspired me.

items.zh: 我记得那次锻炼后肌肉酸痛。
items.answer: I remember a training session that left my muscles sore.

items.zh: 我参加了一个令我难忘的课程。
items.answer: I attended a session that I will never forget.

pipeline.title: 叙事：我的一段经历 · 英译中

items.en: I remember climbing a rope that was very challenging.
items.answer: 我记得爬了一条很有挑战性的绳索。

items.en: I visited a fish tank that was amazing.
items.answer: 我参观了一个令人惊叹的鱼缸。

items.en: I learned a new language that twisted my tongue.
items.answer: 我学了一门绕口令般的新语言。

pipeline.title: 叙事：我的一段经历 · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I remember ___. / I had an experience that ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 我记得... / 我有一段...的经历。

items.zh: 我记得一次去日本的旅行。
items.answer: I remember a trip to Japan.

items.zh: 我有一次让我学到教训的经历。
items.answer: I had an experience that taught me a lesson.

items.zh: 我记得一个有趣的故事。
items.answer: I remember a funny story.

pipeline.title: 叙事：我的一段经历 · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: I remember / I had / I will never forget
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 我记得/我有过/我永远不会忘记

patterns.chunk: I remember ___. / I had ___ that ___.

items.zh: 我记得第一次上台演讲。
items.answer: I remember my first speech on stage.

items.zh: 我有一次改变了我人生的经历。
items.answer: I had an experience that changed my life.

patterns.chunk: I will never forget ___. / The ___ that I ___ most is ___.

items.zh: 我永远不会忘记那一天的教训。
items.answer: I will never forget the lesson from that day.

items.zh: 我最珍惜的回忆是那次旅行。
items.answer: The memory that I treasure most is that trip.

pipeline.title: 观点：我为什么觉得... · 中译英

items.zh: 我觉得这部电影值得看。
items.answer: I think this movie is worth watching.

items.zh: 我认为积极的态度很重要。
items.answer: I think a positive attitude is important.

items.zh: 我觉得这个想法很愚蠢。
items.answer: I think this idea is silly.

pipeline.title: 观点：我为什么觉得... · 英译中

items.en: I think there is some doubt about the plan.
items.answer: 我认为这个计划有些疑问。

items.en: I think people are confused about the instructions.
items.answer: 我认为人们对说明感到困惑。

items.en: I think he was unconscious of the danger.
items.answer: 我认为他没有意识到危险。

pipeline.title: 观点：我为什么觉得... · 句型
pipeline.pattern: I think ___ is worth ___. / I think ___ is ___.

items.zh: 我觉得这部电影值得看。
items.answer: I think the movie is worth watching.

items.zh: 我认为积极的态度很重要。
items.answer: I think a positive attitude is important.

items.zh: 我觉得这个想法很愚蠢。
items.answer: I think this idea is silly.

pipeline.title: 观点：我为什么觉得... · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: I think / I believe / In my opinion
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 我觉得/我相信/在我看来

patterns.chunk: I think ___ is worth ___. / I believe ___ is ___.

items.zh: 我觉得这本书值得一读。
items.answer: I think this book is worth reading.

items.zh: 我相信努力付出就会有回报。
items.answer: I believe hard work pays off.

patterns.chunk: In my opinion ___. / The reason why I think ___ is that ___.

items.zh: 在我看来，这是最好的选择。
items.answer: In my opinion this is the best choice.

items.zh: 我为什么这么觉得是因为我亲身经历过。
items.answer: The reason why I think so is that I experienced it myself.

pipeline.title: 长篇描述：我最喜欢的... · 中译英

items.zh: 我最喜欢的是那些令人快乐的人。
items.answer: What I like most are cheerful people.

items.zh: 我最欣赏的是那种不服输的精神。
items.answer: What I admire most is the spirit of never giving up.

items.zh: 我描述了一段美满的婚姻。
items.answer: I described a happy marriage.

pipeline.title: 长篇描述：我最喜欢的... · 英译中

items.en: The person I admire most is a true gentleman.
items.answer: 我最敬仰的人是一个真正的绅士。

items.en: What I like about this city is the broad streets.
items.answer: 这个城市我最喜欢的是宽阔的街道。

items.en: I strongly believe that honesty is the best policy.
items.answer: 我坚信诚实是最好的策略。

pipeline.title: 长篇描述：我最喜欢的... · 句型
pipeline.pattern: What I like most about ___ is ___. / The ___ that I enjoy most is ___.
pipeline.patternMeaning: 关于...我最喜欢的是... / 我最享受的...是...。

items.zh: 这个城市我最喜欢的是这里的人。
items.answer: What I like most about this city is the people.
items.pattern: What I like most about ___ is ___.

items.zh: 这个工作我最喜欢的是团队。
items.answer: What I like most about this job is the team.
items.pattern: What I like most about ___ is ___.

items.zh: 这所学校我最喜欢的是老师们。
items.answer: What I like most about this school is the teachers.
items.pattern: What I like most about ___ is ___.

pipeline.title: 长篇描述：我最喜欢的... · 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: What I like most / The thing I enjoy / My favorite
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 我最喜欢的/我最享受的/我的最爱

patterns.chunk: What I like most about ___ is ___. / The thing that I enjoy most is ___.

items.zh: 这本书我最喜欢的是故事的情节。
items.answer: What I like most about this book is the story plot.

items.zh: 我最享受的事情是和家人在一起。
items.answer: The thing that I enjoy most is being with family.

patterns.chunk: My favorite ___ is ___. / I decided to ___ because I think ___.

items.zh: 我最喜欢的季节是秋天。
items.answer: My favorite season is autumn.

items.zh: 我决定学英语，因为它对我的未来很重要。
items.answer: I decided to learn English because I think it's important for my future.
